title: Emails Invitations to Meetings Logging in Emails and Activities
excerpt: My client is at the account level emails and activities and wants to see communication with all the contacts connected. However, at times, they send out an invite to a meeting with all those contacts, sometimes 10 people…

posts.author: avrij (Alex Vrij)
posts.cookedHtml:
My client is at the account level emails and activities and wants to see communication with all the contacts connected. However, at times, they send out an invite to a meeting with all those contacts, sometimes 10 people.

In the account record, all 10 invites to a Teams meeting is recorded. Is there anyway to filter all this out?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alex,

Just to clarify, are you interested in filtering our specific emails (i.e. those invites) in each contacts item? If you can provide an example via a screenshot, that would be greatly appreciated (providing no confidential data is shared)
